message:
refactor(beads): remove unused SynthesisFields type and related functions

Remove dead code: SynthesisFields struct, ParseSynthesisFields, and
FormatSynthesisFields from internal/beads/fields.go along with their
tests and helper functions. These were only referenced within their own
definition file and test file, with no callers elsewhere in the codebase.

Closes: gt-vkpi08.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
